title: FOV Scroll
description: Simple mod for change in-game FOV
body:
FOV Scroll is a handy mod that lets you quickly and smoothly change your Field of View (FOV) in-game using the mouse wheel and a configurable key.

Just hold your chosen key (default: Right Alt) and scroll the mouse wheel to increase or decrease your FOV.

All parameters (min, max, step, key) are configurable.

### Exciting Update: FOV Scroll Mod Now Available on Fabric Loader! Find out more in the Changelog tab.
